name: emilkowalski-skills
description: Design engineering and animation skills by Emil Kowalski.

interface.shortDescription: Review and improve interface motion and design craft.
interface.longDescription: Design engineering skills for reviewing animations, planning motion improvements, finding animation opportunities, and applying polished interface principles.
defaultPrompt: Review the animations in this interface.
Find high-value animation opportunities in this UI.
Create a plan to improve this codebase's motion design.
